Pattern Donegal brings fashion to the forefront in your home where traditions start, and everyone is welcome. This bold plain assimilates inspiration from the runways of Paris, London, and Milan. A plain fabric seems like the simplest of textiles, but what goes into the creation of a great plain is really quite complicated. Beauty radiates warmth from the inspired mix of color and texture in pattern Donegal. Plush chenille is the yarn that creates a lofty feel and luxurious soft hand combined into an intricate dimensional plain weave. Donegal is alluring on its own offering exciting new colors each dreamy, natural, and calming. Live well with this chic and casual cover.

The hottest trend in today’s home furnishing textiles are lofty textured fabrics, which create distinctive character and appeal. Navaro is a textured yarn dyed boucle fabric constructed of curly-looped fibers woven throughout. The trend setting style of Boucle yarns is derived from the French word for CURLY. The resurgence of this cozy nubby textile is directly related to the popularity of mid-century and modern furniture offering a luxe appearance. Navaro is a unique European influenced mid-century look, offered in a trendy color palette that is soft and inviting and works beautifully in todays home environment.

Great Smokies is corrected and embossed, with a waxy, soft hand. The slight crackled finish is achieved by tumbling, and the visual depth and two-tone coloration are courtesy of roller-coating. A medium-sheen topcoat finishes the look and helps protect against everyday stains and spills.  Finally, hides are hot ironed for smoothness.

These semi-aniline hides are aniline dyed and then finished with a special feel agent added in the retannage to give the hides a superior touch.  Because the feel agent is in the retannage it will not wear off over time. Special Effect: Along with the luxurious touch of Aline, a subtle two tone is added in the end to add to the visual depth and interest of this leather.  The color pallet ranges from traditional colors to transitional to contemporary giving this article universal appeal across all types of styles. This tannage also provides an antimicrobial element due to special finishing.  Please reference the marketing portion of our cover presentation for more detail!

Athena is elegant and sophisticated and has a soft fit that adapts very well to luxury furniture, with an uncluttered but rustic appearance. Being the first iClean™ leather, your environment will be luxurious and protected with Athena.

Transitional/Traditional  This classic Semi-Aniline leather hits all the high notes – it’s creamy soft and smooth with an understated natural grain and a popular two-tone kela effect. With deep rich colors and a medium sheen that adds brightness and radiance, Gramado is elegant and versatile. It works well with any type of furniture including motion and recliners and has been designed for active households.   

Color palette/special texture
Available in classic shades, Gramado features a subtle natural grain and soft, creamy hand. Natural markings have been minimized but will remain visible. 

Techno facts
Hides are selected, cut thinner, and then tanned and dyed using state-of-the-art methods. Hides are lightly corrected, colored, and then overprinted with a kela effect. Then hides are embossed with a natural grain. A medium sheen topcoat is applied to finish the look and help resist everyday stains and spills.

Samba is top grain leather that has been buffed and embossed for consistency.  This colorful eclectic transitional leather is fully protected pigmented leather, surface coated with a treatment for resistance to effects of everyday use while maintaining a wonderfully soft hand.
notes: Some of the very light colors can be subject to color transfer from clothing.  This is not a leather defect if it occurs.  Blue and black denim jeans as well as heavy colored khaki can transfer color to lighter pigmented leather.

description: The dyeing process for Ankur is carried out in drums by means of aniline colorants which ensure a very high degree of light-fastness.  High quality fats are used to maintain and enhance the natural softness of the hide.  The hand of Ankur is achieved through a specific type of re-tanning with a long period of drum milling. Special Effect: After finishing, a special effect roller adds a two tone effect that simulates a genuine hand rubbed effect to the leather.  This tannage also provides an antimicrobial element due to special finishing.   Please reference the marketing portion of our cover presentation for more detail!
